questions.q: In the 1991 film 'The Silence of the Lambs,' what is the profession of Dr. Hannibal Lecter?
Which actor portrayed Darth Vader in the original 'Star Wars' trilogy?
In 'The Dark Knight' (2008), what is the Joker's primary motivation for his crimes?
choices: Seeking chaos and proving a philosophical point

questions.q: Which Disney villain sings the song 'Poor Unfortunate Souls'?

Which villain from 'Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone' attempts to steal the Philosopher's Stone?
In 'Sleeping Beauty' (1959), what does Maleficent curse Princess Aurora to do?
choices: Prick her finger on a spinning wheel and fall into eternal sleep

questions.q: Which actress played Cersei Lannister's on-screen counterpart in the 'Game of Thrones' spinoff film adaptation?
choices: This character hasn't appeared in theatrical films

questions.q: In 'Cinderella' (1950), what is the Fairy Godmother's primary role in the story?
choices: A helper who assists Cinderella in attending the ball

questions.q: Which actor played the villainous Biff Tannen in the 'Back to the Future' film series?

Which villain from 'Batman Begins' (2005) is portrayed as a man who wants to destroy Gotham City?
In 'Frozen' (2013), what is Prince Hans's secret plan?
choices: To marry Elsa and take over the kingdom

questions.q: Which villain from 'Scream' (1996) primarily motivates the Ghostface killers?

choices: To retrieve the ruby slippers and avenge her sister
To prevent Dorothy from returning home

questions.q: Which actor portrayed Thanos in 'Avengers: Infinity War' (2018)?
In 'Aladdin' (1992), what does Jafar wish for from the Genie?
choices: To become a sorcerer more powerful than the Sultan

questions.q: Which villain from 'Gladiator' (2000) orders the death of Maximus's family?

Which actor provided the voice for Scar in Disney's 'The Lion King' (1994)?

choices: Lecter never murdered anyone before his capture

questions.q: Which actor portrays Anton Chigurh, the hitman with a pneumatic bolt gun, in 'No Country for Old Men' (2007)?
In 'The Dark Knight' (2008), what is the Joker's proposed social experiment involving two ferries?
choices: Racing them across the bay for money
Having prisoners and civilians vote to blow up the other ferry
Using them to distribute fear toxin across the city
Sinking both ferries simultaneously to prove chaos

questions.q: What is the true identity of the villain Keyser Söze revealed at the end of 'The Usual Suspects' (1995)?
In 'Amadeus' (1984), what drives Salieri to sabotage Mozart throughout the film?
choices: Professional jealousy and belief that Mozart's talent is undeserved
A personal romantic rivalry over Constanze
Mozart's refusal to teach him composition
Salieri's desire to become Emperor of Austria

questions.q: Which actor plays the nihilist Anton Chigurh's counterpart, the aging Detective Bell, in 'No Country for Old Men'?
In 'Parasite' (2019), what object does Ki-taek use as a weapon during the film's climactic party scene?
What is the central obsession of Hans Gruber, the villain in 'Die Hard' (1988), regarding the Nakatomi Plaza building?
choices: Stealing bearer bonds worth $640 million from the vault
Taking hostages to negotiate a presidential pardon
Destroying the building as an act of terrorism
Kidnapping the CEO's daughter for ransom

In 'Mulholland Drive' (2001), what is the name of the femme fatale character played by Laura Harring?

choices: Using Kryptonite to create a biological weapon
Manipulating Batman to fight Superman directly
Constructing a machine powered by solar radiation
